commit.subject: LU-0000 tests: Check EOPNOTSUPP value
commit.message:
LU-0000 tests: Check EOPNOTSUPP value

Check EOPNOTSUPP value on aarch and ppc

Test-Parameters: trivial fortestonly mdscount=1 mdtcount=1 osscount=1 ostcount=1 clientcount=1 clientarch=aarch64 testlist=sanity env=ONLY="150b1"
Test-Parameters: trivial fortestonly mdscount=1 mdtcount=1 osscount=1 ostcount=1 clientcount=1 clientarch=ppc64le testlist=sanity env=ONLY="150b1"
Signed-off-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Change-Id: I206ab2028e08ee42a15d756c697a1b933f438d7b
